title: narcissus neglectus subsp. biancae
intro: Narcissus neglectus subsp. biancae, also known as Bianca's daffodil, is a rare and endangered subspecies of the Narcissus neglectus, a type of flowering plant in the Amaryllidaceae family. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including a potential anti-inflammatory effect due to the presence of alkaloids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits associated with Bianca's daffodil include its potential to alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression, as well as its antioxidant properties that may help protect against cell damage. Traditional herbal preparations of Narcissus neglectus subsp. biancae include infusions and tinctures, which are sometimes used in folk medicine to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
